title: LimitedSpawners
description: Adds a limit for no of mobs a mob spawners can spawn.
body:
This mod adds a limit for the number of Mobs a mob spawner can spawn in game.

There is a config to change the limit the default is 100 mobs. This mod also affect minecart spawners.

#### Config
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/485407706782498846/886296506859143168/unknown.png)

#### Issues
Report any issues of the mod on [github](https://github.com/StrikerRockers-Mods/LimitedSpawnerFabric/issues)
